headline: Private Credit Redemptions Hit 40% as Oaktree Flags Rising Risks
summary: Retail investors seek up to 40% withdrawals, while Oaktree warns rapid inflows weakened underwriting and widened public-private credit divide

raw.headline: Private Credit Redemptions Hit 40% as Oaktree Flags Rising Risks
raw.summary: Retail investors seek up to 40% withdrawals, while Oaktree warns rapid inflows weakened underwriting and widened public-private credit divide

headline: 3 Reasons We’re Fans of Moody's (MCO)
summary: Although the S&P 500 is down 2.1% over the past six months, Moody’s stock price has fallen further to $443.06, losing shareholders 8.7% of their capital. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
